title: buxus crassifolia
intro: Buxus crassifolia, also known as the Chinese boxwood, is a species of evergreen shrub that is native to southern China and Vietnam. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Buxus crassifolia include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Buxus crassifolia are typically made from its leaves and branches, which can be processed into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
